checkout.reservationNotice: You're booking a tattoo session with Tony The Witch. Your payment of {{price}} confirms your appointment. Complete your info and we'll contact you to coordinate your session date.
checkout.reservationNoticePayment: You're booking a tattoo session with Tony The Witch. Your payment of {{price}} confirms your appointment. After completing payment we'll contact you to coordinate your session date.
checkout.customSessionNotice: Custom payment for session. The amount you entered will be the total to pay.
checkout.shippingGamNote: The GAM includes urban areas of San José, Heredia, Alajuela and Cartago. If your address is in a rural area or outside the metropolitan area, select Outside GAM.
checkout.shippingZoneWarning: If you select an incorrect zone, we'll contact you to adjust the shipping cost.
checkout.name: Name
checkout.direccionPlaceholder: Costa Rican style address: 100m north of the church, 50m west. White house with black gate.
checkout.direccionIntlPlaceholder: City, state/province, street, number, postal code. Include all info needed for shipping.
checkout.confirmedMessage: Thanks, {{name}}. A confirmation has been sent to
checkout.confirmedSimulated: This is a simulated payment — no real charge was made.
checkout.nextDayWarning: The base express shipping cost is 5000 colones. If the actual Uber Flash service cost is higher, we'll contact you via WhatsApp to coordinate payment of the difference.
checkout.nextDayAccept: I accept that the final express shipping cost may vary according to Uber Flash rates.
